{{Quote|You humans are slow as kittens. We cannot stand to breathe this stench any longer. We will wait for you on the far side of the swamp. Beware the vapors in this place.|A [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]]|<ref name="Missions 8" />}}
The '''vapors''' were native creatures to the planet [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]], more specifically to the [[Swamp of Vapors]]. They were sometimes also known as a '''mist creature'''. They resembled wraith-like masses of smoke that appeared almost semi-solid and would be mistaken for fog. While amazing to view, it was dangerous for beings to approach them as the vapors were capable of entering the body of another organism and practically strangle the individual from the inside.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap]]'' {{1st}}
